lane: Lane C / AI ad workflow and creative automation evidence
public_example_boundary: Creatify is a public workflow example only. It is not a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, authorization source, or audit target.

local_sources.use: Internal proof of product-link input, generated ad candidate context, and source-safe workflow/handoff fields. Raw page includes people/product/ad examples and should be redrawn or masked before external use.
Internal structure cue for hook/body/CTA review. Not performance proof, ad approval, or vendor critique.
Internal reference only by default. Do not use as customer-facing visual proof or VULCA performance evidence unless later explicitly approved with source attribution and metric controls.

generated_artifacts.role: internal workflow overlay mapping true public screenshots to VULCA source/input/candidate/review/export/handoff fields
customer-facing candidate distilled from the internal proof; contains no raw vendor UI and no Alibaba case-study proof

vulca_fields.meaning: Product URL, listing, image, offer, or brief source is preserved.
Generated ad candidate, variant, or output state is separated from source and review state.
Hook, body, CTA, scene, product fit, claim fit, brand fit, and channel fit become review fields.
Draft, edit, export, channel, seller-flow, or campaign reuse state is named.
Growth, creative operations, marketplace, seller-flow, or campaign owner receives unresolved items.
Third-party case-study material may inform internal context but is not default customer proof.

customer_facing_use: Use the source-safe distilled card or a redrawn workflow strip. Do not export raw vendor UI or Alibaba case-study material by default.
must_not_claim: Creatify or Alibaba is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA predicts ad performance, ROI, CPA, CTR, ROAS, adoption growth, or campaign outcome.
VULCA approves generated ads, replaces platform checks, replaces legal review, or certifies compliance.
Creatify-reported case-study metrics are VULCA proof.
